entries.chapter: Ability to accompany with vocalist and instrumentalist with development.
entries.topic: Course Work
entries.source_excerpt: Course Work 1. Candidates will be required to practice and perform singing or playing. This performance may be undertaken in connection with the topics suggested below. The practical work of candidates will be assessed by the teacher as course work. The teacher is free to assess the course work either on the basis of continuous assessment or on the basis of periodical tests.

entries.chapter: Suggested topics for practical work:
entries.topic: (i) Individual performances,
entries.source_excerpt: (i) Individual performances,

entries.chapter: Suggested topics for practical work:
entries.topic: (ii) Practice for school functions,
entries.source_excerpt: (ii) Practice for school functions,

entries.chapter: Suggested topics for practical work:
entries.topic: (iii) Performance in a group of either players or singers, not necessarily in school,
entries.source_excerpt: (iii) Performance in a group of either players or singers, not necessarily in school,

entries.chapter: Suggested topics for practical work:

entries.source_excerpt: (iv) Prepare a PowerPoint presentation on an eminent vocalist or instrumentalist.

entries.chapter: Suggested topics for practical work:
entries.topic: (v) A visit to a sound recording studio.
entries.source_excerpt: (v) A visit to a sound recording studio. 3. In addition to the course work the candidates will be tested in singing or playing one instrument by an External Examiner. Assessment 1. The teacher and the External Examiner will assess the practice and performance of candidates. 2. The following aspects of practice and performance should be taken into consideration: (i) Musical performance, Expression, Diction, Tonal quality, Breath control; (ii) Accuracy; (iii) Style and interpretation. 3.
